falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes above 5,500 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained break above this level would contradict the blowoff pattern and suggest a bullish continuation rather than a topping action.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 10-year Treasury yield falls below 3.8% and remains there for 7 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate strong risk-on sentiment and capital flight from safe assets, directly opposing blowoff-top dynamics typically associated with rising yields.

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE VIX index spikes above 32 and maintains above 28 for 10 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volatility would invalidate the current HOLD signal by confirming a classic blowoff-top scenario with panic selling, not a false breakout.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
